{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Crest of the Blackwatch
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Crest of the Blackwatch]] is a squirming mass of tentacles overlaid by six inhuman eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Blackwatch]] Crest is etched on silver buttons.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
